biome_observations.biome_anomalies: Presence of white rabbit figurine in P3. No signs of fungal or biological activity. The final three images (T-2, T-1, CURRENT) are completely black, indicating a total loss of visual data or camera failure.

vision_report.temporal_deltas: From EARLIEST to T-3, the pots remain static with no visible plant growth. From T-2 to CURRENT, the image feed has failed, resulting in total black frames.
vision_report.visual_health_inference: All specimens are presumed dead or removed. The lack of any green biomass suggests a complete failure of the botanical environment.

vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a desolate botanical state. The pots, which should contain specific species, are entirely devoid of plant life. The visual sequence begins with static, empty pots and concludes with a complete loss of visual input, suggesting either a hardware failure or a total cessation of the monitoring environment. No health can be inferred as no living tissue is present.
